title: Pesticide concentrations: Assiniboine River 2006 to 2011 - Canada.ca

## Pesticide concentrations: Assiniboine River 2006 to 2011
This table gives median concentrations of 2,4-D, MCPA and Clopyralid (column headings) for the years 2006 to 2011 (row headings).
